name: Easy Coconut Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Place egg whites into a bowl and beat until stiff.
2. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat.
3. Add vanilla and beat again until light and smooth.
4. Carefully stir in shredded coconut.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto greased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 270 degrees Fahrenheit (slow oven) for about 40 minutes, or until the macaroons are delicately browned around the edges.
